demo_name: Fred Hutch OMOP Ingestion — Data Engineering Session

deploy_target.note: No data-generation job. This kit READS the 6 OMOP source tables from source_schema (read-only) and WRITES bronze/recon/config tables into client_schema. The source tables must already exist. They are produced by the foundation setup job (the `foundation/` bundle, `foundation_setup_job`).

toggle.note: There is no run_with_synthetic_data boolean here. Synthetic vs real = where source_catalog/source_schema point. Synthetic = your own catalog + clinops_foundation (shared foundation). Real = the FH OMOP schema, a DIFFERENT catalog (curated_omop.omop) — so BOTH source_catalog and source_schema must be set. The 6 OMOP table names are identical either way, so no query changes are required. IMPORTANT: the trials FEED (nb 05) is a separate source — it is a workshop simulator that stays on the foundation. It uses feed_schema, NOT source_schema, so repointing OMOP to real does not break the feed.

widget_config.note: The notebooks read from these dbutils.widgets, NOT from bundle vars, so a databricks.yml change alone does not reach an interactive run. At setup the skill rewrites each widget's DEFAULT (the 2nd argument of dbutils.widgets.text) to the chosen value: catalog<-client_catalog, schema<-client_schema, source_schema<-source_schema, source_catalog<-source_catalog (leave blank for synthetic; curated_omop for real). Leave feed_schema on the foundation schema (clinops_foundation, or wherever the foundation deployed) even in real mode — nb 05 reads the live trials feed from /Volumes/<catalog>/<feed_schema>/trial_landing. Rewriting a widget DEFAULT is a setup action, not a rename — allowed.

real_mode.how: Set source_catalog=curated_omop and source_schema=omop in BOTH databricks.yml (targets.client.variables) AND the notebooks/_config.py widget defaults. Leave feed_schema pointed at the foundation — the trials feed is a workshop simulator, not real FH data.
real_mode.rebuild_assets: Real mode is more than a var flip. bronze_* and recon outputs read from src() = source_catalog.source_schema. Any already built from synthetic must be REBUILT: re-run nb 01-04 after repointing so bronze/recon reflect real OMOP. The trials segment (nb 05) is unaffected — it keeps reading the foundation feed via feed_schema.

tables.name: person
tables.role: Read-only OMOP source, one row per patient.

tables.name: condition_occurrence
tables.role: Read-only OMOP source. In nb 01 a v2 append adds condition_source_name to demonstrate schema evolution.

tables.name: measurement
tables.role: Read-only OMOP source. In nb 02 a copy has a deliberate 7-row gap injected to exercise reconciliation.

tables.name: bronze_*
tables.role: Bronze landing tables the TEAM creates in client_schema (e.g. bronze_person). nb 01 evolves bronze on append via mergeSchema.

tables.name: recon_summary
tables.role: Timestamped reconciliation audit table the TEAM writes in nb 02 (one row per table per run).

tables.name: ingest_allowlist
tables.role: UC config table (6 OMOP allowed, 2 restricted denied) the restricted-ingest gate reads in nb 03.

tables.name: bronze_trial_catalog
tables.role: nb 05 — VARIANT bronze the TEAM lands via Auto Loader (cloudFiles) from the shared LIVE trials feed Volume. Schema-stable: (value, trial_raw VARIANT, _source_file, _ingested_at). Row count GROWS as the feed runs.

tables.name: silver_trial_criteria
tables.role: nb 05 — flattened, join-ready trial eligibility criteria (latest-wins per trial_id by load_ts). Includes min_ecog (VARIANT path, NULL when a trial doesn't set it). The eligibility contract the Applied AI pre-screen joins against.

tables.name: bronze_trial_quarantine
tables.role: nb 05 TODO — bad trial records routed aside with a quarantine_reason (unparseable / missing_trial_id / bad_type_age) so a malformed line never fails the load.

tables.name: _ingest_state (volume)
tables.role: nb 05 — a Volume in client_schema holding Auto Loader's schemaLocation + checkpoint for the trials ingest (per-team ingest bookkeeping; never in the shared read-only Volume).

bronze.note: Bronze landing written by the ingest notebooks into client_schema.

silver.note: This DE track owns ingest hardening plus the trials catalog. It ingests the shared LIVE trials feed (foundation land_trial_feed) incrementally with Auto Loader into bronze_trial_catalog, flattens the good records to silver_trial_criteria (the eligibility contract the Applied AI pre-screen joins against), and quarantines bad records to bronze_trial_quarantine. Both groups build in parallel off the 6 OMOP tables; neither waits on the other's data layer. See ../../SHARED_FOUNDATION.md.

dependency_map.note: Read-only OMOP source → bronze in client_schema
nb 02 compares source vs target counts + anti-join for missing keys
nb 03 reads the allow-list before any write
nb 05 Auto Loader reads the shared LIVE feed Volume (source_schema) and appends to bronze in client_schema, checkpointed per-team
good records only, latest-wins per trial_id by load_ts
nb 05 TODO — bad records with a quarantine_reason
The trials catalog silver_trial_criteria is the eligibility contract the Applied AI pre-screen joins against (a hand-off, never a blocker)

source_inputs.description: The 6 read-only OMOP source tables. Synthetic default = clinops_foundation.
source_inputs.active_when: always (this kit does not generate data)

source_inputs.description: FH real OMOP CDM tables — point source_schema here to run against real data. Identical table names.

The shared LIVE clinical-trials feed, streamed by the foundation land_trial_feed simulator. nb 05 ingests it incrementally with Auto Loader (cloudFiles). Read-only shared producer; each team checkpoints in its own schema. feed_schema is the foundation schema (default clinops_foundation) and is INDEPENDENT of source_schema — it stays on the foundation even when OMOP source_schema is repointed to real (curated_omop.omop).
source_inputs.active_when: always — presenter starts/stops the feed via the foundation job

verify_queries.description: Checkpoint 0 — all 6 read-only OMOP source tables present with expected counts
verify_queries.sql: SELECT 'person' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ${client_catalog}.${source_schema}.person UNION ALL SELECT 'condition_occurrence', COUNT(*) FROM ${client_catalog}.${source_schema}.condition_occurrence UNION ALL SELECT 'measurement', COUNT(*) FROM ${client_catalog}.${source_schema}.measurement UNION ALL SELECT 'observation', COUNT(*) FROM ${client_catalog}.${source_schema}.observation UNION ALL SELECT 'drug_exposure', COUNT(*) FROM ${client_catalog}.${source_schema}.drug_exposure UNION ALL SELECT 'note', COUNT(*) FROM ${client_catalog}.${source_schema}.note ORDER BY tbl
verify_queries.expected: person=300, condition_occurrence=300, measurement=720, observation=720, drug_exposure=383, note=265

verify_queries.description: Checkpoint 1 — after the mergeSchema append, bronze has condition_source_name and 600 rows (300 NULL pre-evolution + 300 populated)
verify_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, COUNT(condition_source_name) AS populated FROM ${client_catalog}.${client_schema}.bronze_condition_occurrence

verify_queries.description: Checkpoint 2 — reconciliation flags the injected 7-row measurement gap
verify_queries.sql: SELECT table_name, status, delta FROM ${client_catalog}.${client_schema}.recon_summary ORDER BY event_time DESC
verify_queries.expected: measurement FAIL delta=7; all other tables PASS

verify_queries.description: Checkpoint 5 — clean trials flowed to silver, latest-wins, with min_ecog present. Counts grow as the live feed runs; the point is clean trials are present and deduped.
verify_queries.sql: SELECT trial_id, min_ecog, feed_version FROM ${client_catalog}.${client_schema}.silver_trial_criteria ORDER BY trial_id
verify_queries.expected: one row per trial_id (A/B/C at minimum, then D/E/F as they land); Trial A min_ecog=1, others NULL until they set it

verify_queries.description: Checkpoint 5 — bad records were routed aside with a reason, not allowed to fail the load
verify_queries.sql: SELECT quarantine_reason, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ${client_catalog}.${client_schema}.bronze_trial_quarantine GROUP BY quarantine_reason ORDER BY quarantine_reason
verify_queries.expected: once the opening act passes ~50 min: unparseable=1, missing_trial_id=1, bad_type_age=1 (built by the nb 05 TODO)

lock_targets.reason: OMOP CDM source table names (person, condition_occurrence, measurement, observation, drug_exposure, note) are standard. Renaming breaks the read from source_schema and the synth→real repointing.

The trials LANDING Volume path reads the shared foundation feed via feed_schema: /Volumes/<catalog>/<feed_schema>/trial_landing/trial_catalog. Keep it on feed_schema (the foundation) — never repoint it at client_schema (the feed is a shared producer) and never tie it to source_schema (repointing OMOP to real must not break the feed). Auto Loader schemaLocation + checkpoint MUST stay in client_schema (_ingest_state Volume).
Adaptation skill must not modify itself

checkpoints_note: Notebook-driven checkpoints (Checkpoint 0-4) are documented in RUNBOOK.md. Some (restricted-ingest gate nb 03, SLA window nb 04) are Python assertions rather than SQL — verify by running the notebook cells, not a warehouse query.
